title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 13, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP has launched next-gen SAP Ariba, a platform designed for intelligent procurement leveraging AI. This update aims to revolutionize the source-to-pay process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP announces the 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners. Global winners are selected for their excellence in helping customers achieve their goals.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary: SAP's Distributed Energy Resources platform enables utilities to orchestrate data from various sources for energy flexibility. This platform unlocks the value of distributed energy resources by providing real-time data management.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies now focus on integrating customer experience and operational efficiency across the entire sales-to-payment process. This convergence matters because it boosts customer satisfaction and revenue.
